Description:
The RA-9 is Robotek Arms' premier heavy weapon platform, marketed to military, security, and "qualified industrial" customers. Three firing modes are user-selectable: single-shot for accuracy, three-round burst for tactical engagements, and full automatic for situations the operator no longer expects to walk away from intact.

The weapon shares an ammunition standard with the RA-1 — a deliberate design choice that allows a single round type to be used across the entire Robotek Arms line. Critics have noted that this also allows a single round type to be in shortage across the entire Robotek Arms line. Robotek's response has been to manufacture more ammunition.

The RA-9 is not a subtle weapon. Possession in a civilian context is illegal in most jurisdictions, possession by a robotic unit is illegal in all of them, and possession by a robotic unit operating off-books has been a recurring topic at federal hearings. None of this has reduced the number of RA-9s in circulation.
